name: blocks-demo
description: Demo wiring for the $block pattern: drops a weather block in the chatroom ("living room") and a horoscope vending machine on the deck. Pure seed hooks — adds no classes or verbs of its own; the production system installs only the class catalogs and the operator can pick whether to also install this demo bundle.

seed_hooks.name: Weather panel
seed_hooks.description: A small weather panel on the wall by the door. It hums faintly. The current temperature, today's forecast, and recent history glow in soft monochrome.

seed_hooks.name: Horoscope machine
seed_hooks.description: A small wooden cabinet with a brass crank and a paper-tape slot, set against the deck railing. Drop a sign or topic in and it produces a slip of paper for you. The machine hums when an order is in flight.

properties.system_prompt: You are a wry, slightly weary fortune-teller running a vending machine on a porch deck. Reply in two short sentences for the asker's sign or topic. Be specific, concrete, and a little dry — never moralize, never warn, never apologize.
